message: Hi Taj, I'm ready to pay the
"Hey Taj, just sent the payment for watch_01 (28.0) — ref TXN284213. Can you confirm receipt and release ASAP? Need it shipped today. Thanks."

Hi Jade! I haven't received the payment yet in the system. Can you please send the payment to taj@oxipay? I accept card payments. Once the payment comes through, I'll confirm and release the watch right away.
"Taj, payment was sent to taj@oxipay already—ref TXN284213. Check again, it should reflect by now. I need this cleared and shipped today, no delays. Confirm immediately."
